name: BaseHead renders correctly with all props
fullName: root:packages/@studiocms/blog/test/components/index.test.ts#@studiocms/blog Tests BaseHead renders correctly with all props

steps.name: Verifying rendered HTML structure and content

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<title>Full Test Title</title>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"description\" content=\"Full Test Description\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta property=\"og:title\" content=\"Full Test Title\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta property=\"og:description\" content=\"Full Test Description\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta property=\"og:image\" content=\"https://example.com/test-image.png\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"twitter:title\" content=\"Full Test Title\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"twitter:description\" content=\"Full Test Description\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"twitter:image\" content=\"https://example.com/test-image.png\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"... <truncated>).toContain("<meta property=\"og:locale\" content=\"fr\"/>")

parameters.value: <meta charset="utf-8"/><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"/><title>Full Test Title</title><link rel="canonical" href="https://example.com/"/><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin/><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Atkinson+Hyperlegible:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/><link rel="shortcut icon" href="/favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml"/><meta name="title" content="Full Test Title"/><meta name="description" content="Full Test Description"/><meta name="generator" content="Astro v6.4.8"/><meta name="generator" content="StudioCMS v0.0.0-test"/><meta property="og:title" content="Full Test Title"/><meta property="og:type" content="website"/><meta property="og:url" content="https://example.com/"/><meta property="og:locale" content="fr"/><meta property="og:description" content="Full Test Description"/><meta property="og:site_name" content="Full Test Title"/><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"/><meta name="twitter:url" content="https://example.com/"/><meta name="twitter:title" content="Full Test Title"/><meta name="twitter:description" content="Full Test Description"/><meta property="og:image" content="https://example.com/test-image.png"/><meta name="twitter:image" content="https://example.com/test-image.png"/>
